ideation: This animation sequence will depict a gentle, embracing gesture, suitable for a teddy bear. The robot will extend both arms outward and slightly downward, as if offering a hug or inviting a cuddle. The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the calm and comforting nature of a teddy bear.  The palms will face upward to add to the welcoming nature of the pose. Frame 1 will start with arms at the sides, frame 2 will show arms extending outward, frame 3 will show arms slightly lowered, and frame 4 will show arms returning slightly inward, ending the sequence with a slight relaxation of the arms. This sequence should highlight the gentle, comforting nature of a teddy bear.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for a hug
arms extend outward, palms up in welcome
arms lower slightly, a gentle embrace offered
arms settle inward, a comforting cuddle
